thinks.think: A title card features the word "sQuiRks" in red, bubbly letters with white outlines on a black, TV-like screen against an orange backdrop. The scene abruptly changes to a blurry, low-resolution shot of a beach with indistinct figures in the distance. On the right side, cutout images of people, including one in a blue shirt and black pants, are superimposed over the sandy environment.

The blurry view resolves to show a man in a light blue tank top and sunglasses standing on a beach. He places his hands on his hips. Behind him, people are visible on the sand near the water. In the upper right, superimposed cutout figures appear to walk along the horizon line above the sea.

The man in the light blue tank top stands with hands on hips as animated chaos erupts in the sky. A blurry projectile streaks from the upper left, while a blue car flies upward on the right next to a yellow starburst graphic. The superimposed cutout figures in the background are partially obscured by these new flying elements.

The scene becomes overlaid with heavy horizontal static lines. Text appears in the upper left corner reading "Tomorrow 8pm - ARE YOU AFRAID OF DARK?". A logo for "My Classmate Joo" materializes in the upper right with "Tuesdays 8 pm" below it. The man in the blue tank top raises his arms as the distortion increases.

The heavy horizontal static lines disappear, restoring a clear view of the beach. The man in the light blue tank top lowers his arms from a raised position, extends them outward, and turns his body slightly. The text overlays regarding the show schedule remain visible in the top corners.

The camera cuts away from the man to reveal a large, elaborate sandcastle sculpture situated on the sand, surrounded by a small white picket fence in the foreground. The promotional text "Tomorrow 8pm - ARE YOU AFRAID OF DARK?" remains in the top left corner, and an orange square logo containing a white hash symbol stays fixed in the top right.

The view changes to show groups of children and adults digging in the sand with yellow buckets near the water's edge. Several flags in white, yellow, and blue are planted nearby. A lower-third graphic appears displaying "Castle Beach" and "East Coast Parkway," while the "sQuiRks" logo reappears in the bottom right corner.

A close-up shows children playing in the sand. A girl in a white shirt with pink trim stands holding blue shovels. To her right, a child in a blue shirt digs, while another child in pink sits with their back to the camera. The "Castle Beach" lower third and "sQuiRks" logo remain at the bottom.

A close-up view shows a person in a bright pink shirt with grey sleeves crouching to construct a sandcastle featuring multiple towers. They manipulate the sand near the base of the structure. The orange banner labeled "Castle Beach" and the "sQuiRks" television logo persist in the lower corners of the frame.

The scene cuts to a person in a lime green shirt and white cap reaching toward a sand tower. Beside them, an individual in a purple shirt sits with their back to the camera. In the foreground, a low sand wall features a distinct grid pattern, while a large blue bin stands nearby.

The scene cuts to a wide shot of children in white shirts and dark bottoms working on sand structures near a large sandcastle complex behind a white fence. Green trees are visible in the background behind the sculpture. The orange square logo with a white hash symbol stays fixed in the top right corner.

The scene shifts to sandcastle builders. A person in a black shirt with a yellow logo stands with their back turned. Beside them, a boy in a red tank top constructs a castle with towers, while a person in a light blue shirt digs nearby. In the foreground, the top of a head with dark hair and a purple patterned shirt is visible.

An elderly woman with white hair wearing a red and orange patterned shirt crouches to dig in a blue container. Beside her, a young girl in a pink shirt featuring a white butterfly design and denim shorts stands observing. A sandcastle tower is visible in the foreground while the orange hash logo remains in the top right.

A person in a grey shirt and black shorts bends forward, appearing to interact with a child in a pink shirt featuring a white butterfly graphic. To the left, the elderly individual in the red and orange patterned top remains crouched near a blue container. The orange square logo with a white hash symbol persists in the upper right corner.

Two men shake hands in front of a large sandcastle structure. The man on the left wears a yellow polo shirt and a black cap, while the man on the right wears a light blue tank top and sunglasses. The orange hash logo persists in the top right corner.

Two men continue shaking hands in front of a large sandcastle structure. The man on the left, wearing a yellow polo shirt and black cap, smiles. The man on the right, in a light blue tank top and sunglasses, laughs while facing him. An orange square logo with a white hash symbol remains visible in the top right corner.

The men stop shaking hands and stand before sand sculptures. The man in the yellow polo and black cap listens. The man in the light blue tank top and sunglasses gestures with both hands while speaking. The ocean and white fence are visible in the background. The orange hash logo remains in the top right corner.

Two men stand before sand sculptures. The man on the left, wearing a yellow polo shirt and black cap, clasps his hands in front of his waist and looks downward. The man on the right, in a light blue tank top and sunglasses, stands facing him with arms at his sides. An orange logo remains in the top right corner.

Two men stand before sand sculptures. The man in the yellow polo shirt keeps his hands clasped at his waist. The man in the light blue tank top gestures with his right hand, palm open, while facing the other man. The orange hash logo remains in the top right corner.

The man in the yellow polo shirt raises both hands while facing the man in the light blue tank top. The man in the blue tank top stands with arms lower, looking at the first man. Behind them, large sand sculptures and the ocean are visible. An orange logo remains in the top right.

The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the yellow polo shirt smiling. An orange lower third graphic appears with the text "Alvin Lee" and "Castle Beach Founder" in white. A "sQuiRks" logo is visible on the right side of the screen. The background shows sand sculptures and the ocean. The orange hash logo remains in the top right corner.

The man in the yellow polo shirt raises both hands in an open gesture while speaking. An orange lower third graphic appears at the bottom displaying the text "Alvin Lee" and "Castle Beach Founder" in white. A "sQuiRks" logo is visible on the right side. The background shows sand sculptures and the ocean.

The scene transitions to black and white close-up footage showing hands manipulating a black sculpting tool. One person grips the handle while another holds a block-like object nearby. The orange square logo containing a white hash symbol remains visible in the upper right corner of the monochromatic frame.

The black and white footage reveals a man in a white polo shirt and black cap holding a clear plastic mold with a brick pattern. He examines the object while standing on the beach, with blurred figures walking in the background. The orange hash logo persists in the upper right corner.

In black and white footage, a man in a white polo shirt and black cap holds a clear plastic mold with a brick pattern. Another person's hands hold a clump of sand nearby. The man looks down at the objects while the orange hash logo remains visible in the top right corner.

In the black and white footage, the man in the white polo shirt and black cap holds a long, thin object vertically in his right hand while facing forward. People walk on the beach in the background, and the orange hash logo remains visible in the top right corner.

The scene transitions from black and white footage back to color, showing a man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap standing on the beach. He gestures with his hands while speaking, with sand sculptures and the ocean visible in the background. The orange hash logo remains in the top right corner.

The man in the yellow polo shirt gestures with his left hand extended outward while speaking. He stands in front of large sand sculptures with the ocean visible in the distance. An orange square logo containing a white hash symbol remains fixed in the upper right corner of the frame.

The man in the yellow polo shirt continues speaking, gesturing with his left hand extended outward. Behind him, a large sand sculpture displays the carved word "EAST" near a white fence and the ocean. The orange square logo containing a white hash symbol remains fixed in the upper right corner of the frame.

The scene cuts to a group building a sandcastle. A girl in a white shirt and pink shorts stands left holding a mold. A man in a white shirt and sunglasses crouches center, while a woman in a dark blue top works on the right. They surround a small sandcastle tower near a white fence.

A girl in a white shirt and pink shorts stands observing while a man in a white shirt and sunglasses crouches beside a woman in a dark blue top. The trio constructs a sandcastle featuring a central tower near a white grid fence on the sandy beach.

The scene cuts to the man in the yellow polo shirt standing beside a younger man in a light blue tank top. The man in yellow reaches out to touch the nose of the man in blue, who smiles. They stand in front of large sand sculptures with the ocean visible in the background.

The man in the yellow polo shirt moves his hand from the other man's nose to gesture near his forehead. The man in the light blue tank top continues smiling while looking at him. They stand before large sand sculptures with the ocean visible in the background.

The man in the yellow polo shirt gestures with his right hand open, then brings both hands up with palms facing inward while speaking. The man in the light blue tank top stands opposite him, listening. They remain positioned in front of large sand sculptures with the ocean visible in the background.

The video cuts to a wide shot of a beach crowded with children and adults digging in the sand. Many hold yellow buckets and shovels near white, yellow, and blue flags planted in the ground. The ocean is visible in the background with several boats on the horizon.

The scene cuts to a crowded section of the beach with trees and white tents in the background. A woman in a black and white striped shirt stands in the foreground facing away. A man in a red tank top crouches nearby, digging in the sand. Other adults and children are scattered around, interacting with yellow buckets.

A woman in a white bucket hat and black-and-white patterned top holds a camera. Beside her, a man in a bright orange t-shirt with back text walks away. In the foreground left, a woman in a striped shirt remains visible, while the background shows a crowded beach area with trees and white tents.

The scene cuts to a man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap holding a megaphone. He addresses a group of children and adults sitting on the sand. Behind them, the ocean is visible with large ships on the horizon. An orange logo with a white hash symbol remains in the top right corner.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a newspaper page from The Wall Street Journal Asia. The main headline reads "What's cooking," and a smaller article titled "SAND CASTLES" discusses team-building events. An orange square logo with a white hash symbol remains visible in the upper right corner.

The camera pans across the newspaper page to reveal a new section featuring the large bold headline "Not him" beneath the partial phrase "head in sand?". Below the text, a black and white photograph shows a person's face near sand structures, while the orange hash logo remains in the top right corner.

The camera pans to a new newspaper section displaying the headline "Novel ways to corporate gelling" in large grey font. Beside the text, a black and white photograph shows a group of people digging in the sand with shovels, while the orange square logo with a white hash symbol persists in the upper right corner.

The camera reveals more of a newspaper page headlined "Novel ways to corporate gelling." Text reading "COVER STORY/CINEMA" and page number "29" appear at the top right. Below a black-and-white photo of people digging, the caption "Building castles, strengthening ties" is visible next to a smaller inset photo of a smiling man's face.

Close-up footage captures hands packing wet sand with a blue handled tool while a green flat trowel rests on the surface. The scene shifts to a person wearing a light blue tank top and grey shorts kneeling on the beach, holding a blue plastic mallet near a pink bucket.

A close-up reveals the face of the man in the light blue tank top, who wears dark sunglasses and has spiky black hair. The camera then captures an arm reaching down towards the sand, while a person wearing red shorts stands nearby in the background.

The scene cuts to a young boy wearing a white t-shirt with "ICE HOCKEY 28" text and yellow shorts standing on the beach holding a blue tool. He is surrounded by other children digging in the sand near yellow buckets and small sandcastles, while adults crouch nearby and the ocean is visible in the background.

A boy in a white t-shirt with blue text and yellow shorts stands holding a blue tool. He raises his left hand near his head while looking forward. Surrounding him, other children dig in the sand near yellow buckets and small sandcastles, with adults and the ocean visible in the background.

A boy in a white t-shirt with blue "ICE HOCKEY" text and yellow shorts stands holding a blue tool while other children dig nearby. The camera then zooms in extremely close on his torso, filling the frame with the white fabric and blue lettering of his shirt.

The video cuts to black and white footage showing a man crouching on the left and a boy standing centrally holding a dark tool near sandcastles. Other figures dig in the background. White text overlay reading 'HOW TO BUILD A SANDCA' appears at the bottom.

The white text overlay at the bottom completes to read 'HOW TO BUILD A SANDCASTLE'. The footage switches from black and white to color, revealing a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts standing near a crouching man in a blue tank top and sunglasses on the beach.

A boy wearing a white t-shirt and yellow shorts stands beside a crouching man in a blue tank top and sunglasses. The boy extends his right arm to point at the sand structure the man is shaping. In the background, other children and adults dig in the sand near the ocean waves.

A man in a blue sleeveless shirt and sunglasses stands up from crouching to shape a sand structure with a green tool. A boy in a white t-shirt and yellow shorts stands nearby watching, surrounded by yellow and green buckets on the sandy beach.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses stands holding a green tool with both hands over the sand. A boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts stands to the left observing. Yellow buckets and a green bucket are on the sand near a yellow flag. Other people are visible in the background near the ocean waves.

A man in a blue tank top stands holding a green tool with both hands over the sand while a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts watches him. Several yellow buckets and a green bucket sit on the sand nearby next to a yellow flag. In the background, other beachgoers walk near the water's edge under bright sunlight.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses looks directly at the camera while holding a green scoop, standing beside a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts who observes yellow buckets. A yellow flag displaying "BEACH" vertically is planted in the sand to the left, with other people visible near the water in the background.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses holds a green scoop, looking at the camera before shifting his gaze downward while leaning forward. Beside him, a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts looks down at yellow buckets. A yellow flag with 'BEACH' text stands to the left, while other beachgoers are visible near the water.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses looks at the camera, holding a green scoop in his left hand and gesturing with his right. He leans forward slightly with his mouth open. Beside him, a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts stands near yellow buckets, looking down at the sand.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses leans forward towards the camera, holding a green scoop in his left hand while gesturing with his right. Beside him, a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts stands looking down at the sand. In the background, other beachgoers walk near the water's edge under bright sunlight.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses leans forward towards the camera, holding a green scoop in his left hand. Beside him, a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts turns slightly away, looking down at yellow buckets on the sand. Other beachgoers are visible near the water in the background under bright sunlight.

A close-up captures a man in a light blue tank top and sunglasses crouching on the sand, looking toward his right. Behind him, a person in white shorts stands while another individual in red shorts crouches nearby, digging. An orange logo with a white hash symbol remains visible in the top right corner.

A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses crouches beside a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts on the beach. The boy uses a blue tool to shape a sandcastle while the man looks toward the camera. Other children dig in the sand nearby in the background near the water.

The view shifts to a close-up of the boy in the white shirt and yellow shorts crouching on the sand. He uses a small green cup to pack wet sand, revealing a dark star-shaped temporary tattoo on his left forearm as he works near a sandcastle tower.

A close-up view focuses on a boy in a white shirt crouching on the sand. He uses both hands to press a small green cup into the wet sand, packing it tightly. A dark star-shaped temporary tattoo is clearly visible on his left forearm as he works on the sandcastle structure nearby.

A boy in a white shirt crouches on the sand, holding a green cup mold. He lifts the green mold upwards with his right hand. A dark star-shaped tattoo is clearly visible on his left forearm. A yellow bucket sits nearby in the background as he works on the sand structure.

A close-up view shows a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts crouching on the sand. He holds a green cup mold with both hands, pressing it into the wet sand. A dark star tattoo is clearly visible on his left forearm as he shapes the sand structure.

A close-up shows a boy pressing a green mold into the wet sand with both hands. A dark star-shaped tattoo is visible on his left forearm. He packs the sand tightly around the green object near a yellow bucket, continuing to construct the sandcastle base.

A close-up shows a boy pressing a green cup mold into wet sand with both hands. A dark star tattoo is visible on his left forearm. He then lifts the green mold upwards with his right hand, holding it above the sand surface.

A close-up captures a boy packing sand with a green cup mold. A dark star tattoo is clearly visible on his left forearm. He presses the green object into the wet sand, shaping the castle base, while a yellow bucket sits nearby in the background.

A close-up captures a boy lifting a green cup mold upwards from the wet sand. A dark star-shaped tattoo is visible on his left forearm as he grips the mold with both hands. He raises the object away from the sand surface near a yellow bucket.

A wide shot captures a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts placing a green mold onto a sandcastle tower. Beside him, a man in a blue tank top and sunglasses crouches while observing. To the right, another boy in a red and white shirt kneels on the sand. The background features the beach, ocean waves, and other children playing.

A boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts adjusts a green mold on a sandcastle tower while a man in a blue tank top crouches beside him. To the right, a boy in a red and white shirt kneels on the sand, observing the construction near the ocean waves.

The scene shifts to black and white as the boy in the white shirt stands up from the sandcastle. A girl in a white shirt enters the frame from the right, while the man in the tank top stands up nearby. Other children are visible standing and kneeling in the background.

In the black and white footage, a boy in a white shirt and shorts stands near a sandcastle, accompanied by a man in a tank top and sunglasses behind him. To the right, a girl in a white shirt stands watching, while another boy kneels beside the structure, all focused on the sand.

In the black and white footage, the man in the tank top stands upright. A boy in a dark shirt moves to the right foreground. The boy in the white shirt looks down at the sandcastle while the kneeling child continues building.

In black and white footage, a man in a tank top and sunglasses steps forward towards the left. A boy in a white shirt stands nearby, while a kneeling child continues shaping the sandcastle. To the right, a boy in a dark shirt stands watching the activity on the beach.

In black and white footage, a man in a tank top leans forward over a sandcastle where a kneeling child shapes the sand. A standing boy in a white shirt looks down at the structure, while a boy in a dark shirt stands to the right observing the beach activity.

To the right, a standing child in a dark shirt looks towards the camera, while another child in a white shirt stands left looking down.

In black and white footage, a man in a tank top and sunglasses shifts his gaze downward while leaning over a sandcastle. A kneeling child continues shaping the sand structure with hands, while a standing child in a dark shirt observes nearby. The man remains bent over the activity.

In black and white footage, a man in a tank top and sunglasses rises from a crouch near a sandcastle. A child kneels shaping the sand structure, while another child in a dark shirt stands to the right. The man looks down at the sandcastle as he stands fully upright on the beach.

In black and white footage, a man wearing a tank top and sunglasses bends forward from a standing position. He extends his left arm towards a sandcastle structure where a child is kneeling and shaping the sand. To the right, another child in a dark shirt stands observing the activity on the beach.

In black and white footage, a man in a tank top and sunglasses bends at the waist, extending his arm toward a sandcastle structure. A kneeling child molds the sand nearby, while a standing child in a dark shirt watches from the right side of the frame.

A man in a tank top and sunglasses bends at the waist, extending an arm toward a sandcastle where a kneeling child shapes the sand. A standing child in a dark shirt watches from the right side of the black and white beach scene.

In the black and white footage, the man in the tank top and sunglasses crouches lower towards the sandcastle. The standing child on the right lifts a white bucket. The kneeling child continues shaping the sand structure with their hands.

A man wearing a yellow shirt and cap speaks into a white megaphone. The view shifts to a group of people on the beach celebrating; a man in a teal shirt raises both arms in victory while a man in a blue and white shirt claps beside him.

A man in a teal shirt holds a red wrapped gift high above his head while standing in a crowd on the beach. To his right, a man in a white shirt hands a similar red gift to a child. People around them watch and clap near large sand sculptures and the ocean.

A wide shot captures a boy in a yellow shirt and shorts standing in the foreground with his back to the camera, facing a beach populated with sandcastles. In the background, a crowd of people gathers near a white tent situated under trees. Colorful buckets and molds are scattered on the sand around the boy's feet.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a smiling man in sunglasses and a blue tank top beside a boy in a white shirt with the number 28 gesturing with open hands. Behind them, a child holds a pink object while others stand on the sandy beach.

The boy in the white shirt looks down at sand cupped in his hands while the man in the blue tank top leans in. The view tightens to show "CE HOCKEY" text on the boy's shirt and a child in a red shirt holding a pink mold nearby.

Close-up of a boy in a white shirt holding sand while a person holds a pink mold nearby. The view cuts to a man in a blue tank top sitting beside a sandcastle on the beach. He looks upward and gestures with his right hand, with the ocean and cloudy sky visible in the background.

A man in a blue tank top and grey shorts sits beside a sandcastle on the beach. He turns his head from looking upward to facing the camera directly, smiling with his hands resting near his knees. The background features the ocean horizon under a cloudy sky with distant ships.

A man in a blue tank top and grey shorts sits beside a sandcastle, shifting his gaze to look directly at the camera while smiling. His legs remain crossed with hands resting near his ankles. The background features the ocean horizon with distant ships under a cloudy sky.

A man in a blue tank top and grey shorts sits on the sand beside a sandcastle structure. He looks directly at the camera with a smile, his hands resting on his shins. The background shows the ocean horizon with distant ships under a cloudy sky.

A man wearing a blue tank top and grey shorts sits on the sand beside a detailed sandcastle structure. He looks towards the camera and smiles broadly, resting his hands on his legs. The background features a calm ocean horizon with distant ships under a cloudy sky.

summary.text:
[0-2] A title card displays "sQuiRks" in red bubbly letters on a black screen against orange, shifting to a blurry beach with superimposed cutout figures, including one in a blue shirt.
[2-4] A man in a light blue tank top and sunglasses stands with hands on hips. Behind him, beachgoers are visible, and cutout figures walk along the horizon.
[4-6] Animated chaos erupts as a projectile streaks left and a blue car flies up near a yellow starburst, partially obscuring background cutouts while the man remains still.
[6-8] Heavy horizontal static overlays the scene. Text appears: "Tomorrow 8pm - ARE YOU AFRAID OF DARK?" and a logo "My Classmate Joo" with "Tuesdays 8 pm". The man raises his arms.
[8-10] The static clears. The man lowers his arms, extends them outward, and turns slightly. The schedule text overlays remain visible in the corners.

[12-14] Groups dig with yellow buckets near white, yellow, and blue flags as a lower third displays "Castle Beach" and "East Coast Parkway" alongside the "sQuiRks" logo. [14-18] Close-ups feature a girl in white/pink holding blue shovels and a person in a pink/grey shirt constructing a multi-towered sandcastle, with the graphic persisting. [18-20] A person in a lime green shirt and white cap reaches toward a tower near a seated individual in purple and a blue bin, while a grid-patterned sand wall sits in the foreground. [20-22] A wide shot reveals children in white shirts working near a large sandcastle complex behind a white fence with trees in the background. [22-24] A person in a black shirt with a yellow logo stands near a boy in a red tank top building a castle and another digging in light blue.

[26-28] A person in a grey shirt and black shorts bends forward, appearing to interact with a child in a pink shirt featuring a white butterfly graphic. To the left, an elderly individual in a red and orange patterned top remains crouched near a blue container. [28-34] Two men stand before large sand sculptures; the man on the left wears a yellow polo shirt and black cap, while the man on the right wears a light blue tank top and sunglasses. They shake hands, smiling and laughing. Subsequently, they stop shaking hands, and the man in the blue tank top gestures with both hands while speaking to the man in the yellow shirt, who listens. The ocean and a white fence are visible in the background, with "EAST" carved into a sand sculpture. An orange square logo with a white hash symbol persists in the upper right corner.

An elderly woman with white hair in a red and orange patterned shirt digs in a blue container, while a young girl in a pink shirt with a white butterfly design and denim shorts observes near a sandcastle tower. Two men stand before sand sculptures; one wears a yellow polo and black cap, the other a light blue tank top and sunglasses. The man in blue gestures with an open palm, then the man in yellow raises both hands. A close-up shows the man in yellow, identified by an orange lower third as "Alvin Lee, Castle Beach Founder," with a "sQuiRks" logo visible. He smiles and gestures with open hands. An orange hash logo remains top right.

[44-46] Black and white footage shows hands manipulating a black sculpting tool and block-like object. [46-50] A man in a white polo shirt and black cap holds a clear plastic mold with a brick pattern while another person holds a clump of sand. [50-52] The man holds a long, thin object vertically. [52-56] The scene transitions to color, showing the man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap gesturing while speaking. He stands in front of sand sculptures with "EAST" visible and the ocean in the background. An orange square logo containing a white hash symbol remains in the upper right corner.

[56-58] A man in a yellow polo shirt, black cap, and sunglasses speaks, gesturing with his left hand extended outward near a large sand sculpture carved with the word "EAST" beside a white fence and the ocean, with an orange square logo containing a white hash symbol in the upper right corner. [58-62] The scene cuts to a group where a girl in a white shirt and pink shorts stands observing while a man in a white shirt and sunglasses and a woman in a dark blue top crouch to construct a sandcastle tower featuring a central spire near a white grid fence on the sandy beach. [62-68] The man in the yellow polo shirt stands beside a younger man in a light blue tank top, playfully reaching out to touch the other man's nose before gesturing near his forehead and then with open palms while speaking as the younger man smiles and listens in front of the large sand sculptures.

[70-76] In a crowded beach section with trees and white tents, a woman in a black and white striped shirt stands in the foreground facing away while a man in a red tank top crouches nearby digging. Others interact with yellow buckets. A woman in a white bucket hat and black-and-white patterned top holds a camera. Beside her, a man in a bright orange t-shirt walks away. A man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap holds a megaphone, addressing a group sitting on the sand. Behind them, the ocean is visible with large ships on the horizon. An orange logo with a white hash symbol remains in the top right corner.
[76-80] The scene cuts to a newspaper page from THE WALL STREET JOURNAL ASIA. The main headline reads "What's cooking," and a smaller article titled "SAND CASTLES" discusses team-building events. The camera pans to reveal the large bold headline "Not him" beneath "head in sand?". Below, a black and white photograph shows a person's face near sand structures.

[80-84] The camera pans a newspaper page headlined "Novel ways to corporate gelling" with "COVER STORY/CINEMA 29" at the top. A black and white photo shows a group digging, captioned "Building castles, strengthening ties" beside an inset of a smiling man, while an orange logo with a white hash remains in the corner.
[84-88] On the beach, hands pack wet sand with a blue tool near a green trowel. A man in a light blue tank top and grey shorts kneels holding a blue plastic mallet by a pink bucket. He wears dark sunglasses and has spiky black hair. An arm reaches toward the sand as a person in red shorts stands nearby.

[90-94] A boy in a white t-shirt with blue "ICE HOCKEY" text and "28", plus yellow shorts, stands holding a blue tool and raising his left hand. Other children dig near yellow buckets and sandcastles. The camera zooms extremely close on the boy's torso. [94-96] The scene cuts to black and white; a man crouches left while the boy stands centrally holding a dark tool near sand structures. Text overlay "HOW TO BUILD A SANDCA" appears. [96-98] The text completes to "HOW TO BUILD A SANDCASTLE" as footage returns to color, showing the boy near a crouching man in a blue tank top and sunglasses.

[88-90] A young boy wearing a white t-shirt with "ICE HOCKEY 28" text and yellow shorts stands on the beach holding a blue tool, surrounded by other children digging in the sand near yellow buckets and small sandcastles while adults crouch nearby. [98-100] The boy stands beside a crouching man in a blue tank top and sunglasses, extending his right arm to point at the sand structure the man is shaping as other children and adults dig near the ocean waves in the background. [100-104] The man stands up from crouching to shape a sand structure with a green tool held in both hands while the boy watches, surrounded by yellow and green buckets and a yellow flag on the sandy beach.

From 106-114s, a man in a blue tank top and sunglasses stands on the beach holding a green scoop. He looks at the camera, shifts his gaze downward, and leans forward, gesturing with his right hand. Beside him, a boy in a white shirt with 'ICE HOCKEY' text and yellow shorts stands near yellow buckets, looking down at the sand. To the left, a yellow flag with vertical 'BEACH' text is planted in the sand. In the background, other beachgoers walk near the water's edge under bright sunlight.

[114-116] A man in a blue tank top and sunglasses leans forward holding a green scoop, beside a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts looking at yellow buckets. [116-118] The man crouches looking right, while a person in white shorts stands and another in red shorts digs behind him; an orange logo with a white hash appears. [118-120] The man and boy crouch together building a sandcastle; the boy uses a blue tool while the man faces the camera. [68-70] A wide shot shows a beach crowded with children and adults digging in the sand near yellow buckets, shovels, and white, yellow, and blue flags, with the ocean and boats in the background. [122-126] A close-up reveals a boy in a white shirt crouching to press a small green cup into wet sand, showing a dark star-shaped temporary tattoo on his left forearm, before he lifts the green mold upwards to shape the sand.

[130-136] Close-up shots feature a boy with a visible dark star tattoo on his left forearm manipulating a green cup mold. He packs sand into the mold, pressing it into the wet surface to shape a castle base near a yellow bucket, before lifting the green object upwards away from the sand. [136-138] The camera pulls back to a wide shot where the boy, dressed in a white shirt and yellow shorts, places the green mold onto a sandcastle tower. The background displays a sunny beach environment with ocean waves and various other children playing in the distance.

[140-148] In black and white footage, a boy in a white shirt and shorts stands up from the sandcastle while a man in a tank top and sunglasses stands up nearby. The man steps forward towards the left as a kneeling child continues shaping the sandcastle. The boy in the white shirt looks down at the sand, focused on the structure, while the boy in the dark shirt stands watching the activity. Other children are visible standing and kneeling in the background near the water.

[138-140] A boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts adjusts a green mold on a sandcastle tower while a man in a blue tank top crouches beside him. A standing boy in a white shirt looks down at the structure, while a boy in a dark shirt stands to the right observing the beach activity. The man shifts his gaze downward and remains bent over the activity.

In color footage, a man wearing a tank top and sunglasses bends forward and crouches near a sandcastle structure, extending his arm toward it. The view cuts to the man in the blue tank top and grey shorts sitting beside a sandcastle on the beach. He looks upward and gestures with his right hand, with the ocean and cloudy sky visible.

[4-6] Animated chaos erupts as a projectile streaks left and a blue car flies up near a yellow starburst, partially obscuring background cutouts while the man remains still. [6-8] Heavy horizontal static overlays the scene. Text appears: "Tomorrow 8pm - ARE YOU AFRAID OF DARK?" and a logo "My Classmate Joo" with "Tuesdays 8 pm". The man raises his arms. [8-10] The static clears. The man lowers his arms, extends them outward, and turns slightly. The schedule text overlays remain visible in the corners. [12-14] Groups dig with yellow buckets near white, yellow, and blue flags as a lower third displays "Castle Beach" and "East Coast Parkway" alongside the "sQuiRks" logo. [14-18] Close-ups feature a girl in white/pink holding blue shovels and a person in a pink/grey shirt constructing a multi-towered sandcastle, with the graphic persisting. [18-20] A person in a

[44-46] Black and white footage shows hands manipulating a black sculpting tool and block-like object. [46-50] A man in a white polo shirt and black cap holds a clear plastic mold with a brick pattern while another person holds a clump of sand. [50-52] The man holds a long, thin object vertically. [52-56] The scene transitions to color, showing the man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap gesturing while speaking. He stands in front of sand sculptures with "EAST" visible and the ocean in the background. An orange square logo containing a white hash symbol remains in the upper right corner.

[56-58] A man in a yellow polo shirt, black cap, and sunglasses speaks, gesturing with his left hand extended outward near a large sand sculpture carved with the word "EAST" beside a white fence and the ocean, with an orange square logo containing a white hash symbol in the upper right corner. [58-62] The scene cuts to a group where a girl in a white shirt and pink shorts stands observing while a man in a white shirt and sunglasses and a woman in a dark blue top crouch to construct a sandcastle tower featuring a central spire near a white grid fence on the sandy beach. [62-68] The man in the yellow polo shirt stands beside a younger man in a light blue tank top, playfully reaching out to touch the other man's nose before gesturing near his forehead and then with open palms while speaking as the younger man smiles and listens in front of the large sand sculptures.

[70-76] In a crowded beach section with trees and white tents, a woman in a black and white striped shirt stands in the foreground facing away while a man in a red tank top crouches nearby digging. Others interact with yellow buckets. A woman in a white bucket hat and black-and-white patterned top holds a camera. Beside her, a man in a bright orange t-shirt walks away. A man in a yellow polo shirt and black cap holds a megaphone, addressing a group sitting on the sand. Behind them, the ocean is visible with large ships on the horizon. An orange logo with a white hash symbol remains in the top right corner.
[76-80] The scene cuts to a newspaper page from THE WALL STREET JOURNAL ASIA. The main headline reads "What's cooking," and a smaller article titled "SAND CASTLES" discusses team-building events. The camera pans to reveal the large bold headline "Not him" beneath "head in sand?". Below, a black and white photograph shows a person's face near sand structures.

[80-84] The camera pans a newspaper page headlined "Novel ways to corporate gelling" with "COVER STORY/CINEMA 29" at the top. A black and white photo shows a group digging, captioned "Building castles, strengthening ties" beside an inset of a smiling man, while an orange logo with a white hash remains in the corner.
[84-88] On the beach, hands pack wet sand with a blue tool near a green trowel. A man in a light blue tank top and grey shorts kneels holding a blue plastic mallet by a pink bucket. He wears dark sunglasses and has spiky black hair. An arm reaches toward the sand as a person in red shorts stands nearby.

recent_thinks.text: The camera cuts away from the man to reveal a large, elaborate sandcastle sculpture situated on the sand, surrounded by a small white picket fence in the foreground. The promotional text "Tomorrow 8pm - ARE YOU AFRAID OF DARK?" remains in the top left corner, and an orange square logo containing a white hash symbol stays fixed in the top right.

The video cuts to a wide shot of a beach crowded with children and adults digging in the sand. Many hold yellow buckets and shovels near white, yellow, and blue flags planted in the ground. The ocean is visible in the background with several boats on the horizon.

The scene cuts to a young boy wearing a white t-shirt with "ICE HOCKEY 28" text and yellow shorts standing on the beach holding a blue tool. He is surrounded by other children digging in the sand near yellow buckets and small sandcastles, while adults crouch nearby and the ocean is visible in the background.

A boy in a white t-shirt with blue text and yellow shorts stands holding a blue tool. He raises his left hand near his head while looking forward. Surrounding him, other children dig in the sand near yellow buckets and small sandcastles, with adults and the ocean visible in the background.

A boy in a white t-shirt with blue "ICE HOCKEY" text and yellow shorts stands holding a blue tool while other children dig nearby. The camera then zooms in extremely close on his torso, filling the frame with the white fabric and blue lettering of his shirt.

The video cuts to black and white footage showing a man crouching on the left and a boy standing centrally holding a dark tool near sandcastles. Other figures dig in the background. White text overlay reading 'HOW TO BUILD A SANDCA' appears at the bottom.

The white text overlay at the bottom completes to read 'HOW TO BUILD A SANDCASTLE'. The footage switches from black and white to color, revealing a boy in a white shirt and yellow shorts standing near a crouching man in a blue tank top and sunglasses on the beach.
